prompt: Convert this radiology passage with a comparison table into Anki cloze and basic flashcards. Prioritize differentiating features between AML, RCC, simple cyst, and oncocytoma.

assertions.name: valid_cloze_syntax
assertions.description: All cloze cards use valid {{cN::...}} markup

assertions.name: covers_all_entities
assertions.description: Covers AML, RCC, simple cyst, and oncocytoma

assertions.name: table_data_preserved
assertions.description: Key tabular facts (HU values, enhancement, signal) appear as cards
